full_text:
Yang Qun 陽群
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Qun (陽群). Died in the year after Zhuge Liang occupied Hanzhong. Yang Qun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yang Qun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
